summary: Defines a light source for 3D rendering. Supports Point, Directional, Spot, and Cone light types with color, intensity, and shadow controls.

key_params.name: lighttype
key_params.note: Light type: Point, Directional, Spot, Cone

common_gotchas: Lights must be listed in the Render TOP's 'lights' parameter to take effect.
Dynamic shadows are expensive — use static shadows or limit shadow-casting geometry for performance.
